name: tockdocs-workspace
description: Minimal Documentation theme and CLI for shared usage across Nuxt modules

scripts.docs:build: pnpm run check:mdc-source && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=6144 pnpm run layer:prepare && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=6144 node scripts/with-env.mjs nuxt build docs --extends ../layer && pnpm run check:content-integrity
scripts.dev:prepare: node scripts/with-env.mjs nuxt prepare layer && node scripts/with-env.mjs nuxt prepare docs --extends ../layer && node scripts/with-env.mjs nuxt prepare playground --extends ../layer
scripts.test:regression: tsx --test layer/app/components/app/AppHeader.test.ts layer/modules/assistant-panel-regression.test.ts layer/modules/assistant/test/gitfs-bash.test.ts layer/modules/config.test.ts layer/modules/css-regression.test.ts layer/modules/landing-spotlight.test.ts layer/modules/rehype-mathjax-strip-styles.test.ts layer/modules/suppress-vue-suspense-warning.test.ts layer/server/utils/content.test.ts layer/server/utils/index-generator.test.ts layer/server/utils/markdown-source-alias.test.ts layer/server/utils/search-index.test.ts layer/utils/docs-search.test.ts layer/utils/review-fixes.test.ts docs/app/utils/nuxt-studio-editor-mode.test.ts
scripts.precommit: pnpm run check:mdc-source:staged && pnpm run check:raw-html && pnpm run check:i18n && pnpm run lint && pnpm run check:assets && pnpm run dev:prepare
scripts.scan: pnpm run lint && pnpm run check:i18n && pnpm run check:mdc-source && pnpm run check:raw-html && pnpm run check:assets && pnpm run check:translation-parity && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.scan:deep: pnpm run scan && pnpm run knip && pnpm run jscpd:layer && pnpm run depcruise
scripts.verify: pnpm run check:i18n && pnpm run dev:prepare && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run cli:build && pnpm run docs:build
scripts.release: pnpm run layer:release && pnpm run cli:release && release-it
scripts.clean:full: pnpm run clean && rm -rf node_modules cli/node_modules docs/node_modules layer/node_modules playground/node_modules analyze cli/dist pnpm-lock.yaml .pnpm-store
